title: calceolaria × kellyana
intro: Calceolaria × kellyana, also known as the Fairy Bellflower, is a hybrid plant species within the Calceolaria genus. It is a flowering plant native to South America, characterized by its delicate, bell-shaped flowers and slender stems. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to have a range of health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and alleviating cold symptoms. In herbal preparations, Calceolaria × kellyana is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
